cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. So the ethical dilemma here is Lisa, a single mom, who runs every morning for her health and happiness. Her elderly neighbor can't take care of their health because of mobility issues. Should Lisa change her routine to help the neighbor, even if it might mean sacrificing her own well-being?
